videos.title: UW Control for the MTG Arena Creator Showdown!
videos.description:
This is round two of the MTG Arena Content Creator Showdown where communities can win prizes and the winner gets a brand new, magic themed Alienware PC to giveaway.

CGB Dragon Shield Sleeves are here - https://www.dragonshield.com/en-us/p/covertgoblue-sleeves-brushed-art-sleeves-standard-size/AT-18070

videos.title: I created the worst MTG gameshow ever  @Cimoooooooo
